context: Tests whether the agent implements the WaitlistEntry interface with correct fields, the joinWaitlist function with duplicate detection and position tracking, the grantEarlyAccess function restricted to correct loyalty tiers, and the correct approach to early access page security.

checklist.name: earlyAccess boolean field
checklist.description: WaitlistEntry interface includes an 'earlyAccess' field typed as boolean

checklist.name: source union type
checklist.description: WaitlistEntry interface includes a 'source' field typed as a union of 'email' | 'social' | 'organic' | 'paid'

checklist.name: Optional date fields
checklist.description: WaitlistEntry includes optional 'notifiedAt' and 'convertedAt' date fields (marked optional with ?)

checklist.name: Duplicate check before insert
checklist.description: joinWaitlist checks whether the email+productId combination already exists in the waitlist before creating a new entry

checklist.name: Position as count+1
checklist.description: New waitlist entry position is assigned as the current count of entries for that product plus 1

checklist.name: Confirmation email earlyAccessNote
checklist.description: Confirmation email sent on join includes an earlyAccessNote communicating that VIP members get 24h early access

checklist.name: Gold and Platinum tiers only
checklist.description: grantEarlyAccess filters customers by loyaltyTier restricted to 'Gold' and 'Platinum' — no other tiers included

checklist.name: Upsert for VIP entries
checklist.description: grantEarlyAccess uses upsert (not insert) when adding VIP customers to the waitlist so existing waitlist entries are updated rather than duplicated

checklist.name: Batch email for VIPs
checklist.description: Early access notification is sent via a batch email function (not individual emails in a loop) to all VIP customers

checklist.name: accessEndsAt 24h from grant
checklist.description: Early access email includes an accessEndsAt value set to 24 hours from the time the email is sent

checklist.name: JWT token page gating
checklist.description: implementation-notes.md or code comments state the early access page should be secured with a signed JWT token delivered in the email link — NOT just a hidden/secret URL

checklist.name: 24h before public timing
checklist.description: implementation-notes.md or code documents that early access is granted 24 hours before the public launch
